posts.text:
"Shameful." In an extraordinary interview, Pentagon whistleblower @WesJBryant sounds the alarm about what he calls a lack of concern for civilian casualties by the US in Iran. He was part of a Pentagon unit tasked with mitigating civilian harm, but it was gutted last year in government cuts. Worth watching in full.

Video

"I've never seen an American president, not just in our lifetime, in the last two centuries of American history, be that critical of a British prime minister." @RNicholasBurns tells me "a fundamental mistake is: disparage your allies, make life difficult for them at home, you really can't expect them to be with you in a fight that they didn't start

Video

"I did not think it would come to this... it's a full blown crisis." Veteran US diplomat @RNicholasBurns tells me "there has to be an off ramp" in Iran, pointing to warnings from history in Iraq and Afghanistan.

Video

As the US & Israel’s war with Iran escalates, I spoke on Wednesday with Israel’s former Prime Minister @naftalibennett about Israel’s ultimate goal, its targeted assassinations, striking South Pars gas field, Lebanon, and violence in the West Bank. Watch our full interview here.

Video
War between Afghanistan and Pakistan has much wider consequences  ft.com/content/f0980a32-dfd9… via @ft
When the senior Omani mediator speaks, the smart set should listen: economist.com/by-invitation/…

‘He violated the first rule of war’

@amanpour & @TinaBrownLM unpack how Trump’s misinformed stance on Iran escalated tensions – pushing Tehran to weaponise the Strait of Hormuz and raising global stakes

Watch Christiane Amanpour Presents: The Ex Files 🗂️ on @globalplayer 🎧

Video

“We are manufacturing a whole new generation of terrorists in the Middle East,” former U.S. Defense Secretary Chuck Hagel tells me, saying the Trump administration's conduct of its war in Iran appears to him unprecedented.

Video

Iran is "a war without a strategy," former U.S. Defense Secretary Chuck Hagel says, as he warns that threats to global stability are escalating daily.

Video

“Coalition of the willing? It’s a coalition of the insulted.”

@amanpour & @TinaBrownLM discuss whether Trump is now facing the consequences of insulting his NATO allies as they refuse to help secure the Strait of Hormuz

🔗⬇️

Video
